name: AI appointment scheduler with Sheets and email confirmation
description: Takes appointment requests, uses Claude AI to parse scheduling details and check availability against a Google Sheets calendar, then sends a confirmation or alternatives via Gmail.

source.originalName: Chatbot appointment scheduler with Google Calendar for dental assistant

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for the appointment calendar

gmailKey.description: Gmail connection key for sending confirmation emails

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID containing appointment data (columns: Date, Time, PatientName, Email, Status)

patientName.description: Patient or client name requesting the appointment

steps.name: Build AI prompt for scheduling request parsing
Run Claude AI to parse and prepare appointment
